name: token-rate-pi
description: Token rate status extension for pi-coding-agent - shows average output tokens per second
readme: # Token Rate Extension Shows the average output tokens per second (TPS) in the footer status line. ## Setup Install the package and enable the extension: ```bash pi install npm:token-rate-pi pi config ``` Enable `token-rate` in `pi config`. Dependencies are installed automatically during `pi install`. ## Usage - The status line shows `TPS: --` until it has enough data. - After each assistant turn, it updates to `TPS: tok/s`. - Resets when the session starts or when switching sessions. ## File Structure ``` token-rate/ token-rate.ts # Extension entry point + status updates package.json # Declares extension via "pi" field ``` ## License MIT (see repository root)
